topic.title: 1/31 12:00 PM EST - Guest Speaker: Shesh Gupta, Senior Manager Data Science, Capital One
topic.text:
Hello,

Tomorrow we welcome guest speaker Shesh Gupta, Senior Manager of Data Science and Machine Learning at Capital One.

Shesh has over 14 years of experience turning data into actionable business intelligence. His work spans machine learning, natural language processing, deep learning, and computer vision. He's published research in reputable journals and delivered measurable results - including predictive models that improved customer retention by 15%, data pipelines that cut processing time by 50%, and data-driven solutions that increased revenue by 20%.

His approach: "Data are just summaries of thousands of insights - I uncover a few of those insights to help make the data meaningful."

Or as he puts it: "I spend my days torturing the data so that it reveals what it is hiding."

Come prepared with questions about how data science and machine learning intersect with brand strategy, customer insights, and business decision-making.

See you tomorrow, Saturday 12:00 PM ET.

Thanks, Prof. Nik & Nina
